events.title: UC Berkeley Grad Slam Competition
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Cheer on Berkeley grad students as they showcase their research in a series of three-minute talks, competing for the 'Berkeley Finalist' title.

events.title: Cultural Analytics Series: Writing With and Beyond AI: Fieldnotes from Computer-Mediated Poetry (Talk)
events.organizer: Berkeley Institute for Data Science (BIDS) and I School
events.description: A talk by Kyle Booten as part of the Cultural Analytics series, exploring computer-mediated poetry.

events.title: Cultural Analytics Series: Writing With and Beyond AI: Fieldnotes from Computer-Mediated Poetry (Discussion)
events.organizer: Berkeley Institute for Data Science (BIDS) and I School
events.description: A discussion session with Kyle Booten following his talk on computer-mediated poetry.

events.title: CRELS Speaker Series with Simone Zhang: Scoring Justice: Risk Assessment Tools, Court Practices, and Fairness Perceptions
events.description: Simone Zhang will present on risk assessment tools and fairness perceptions in the justice system.

events.description: Monthly knowledge exchange event organized by the Open Source Program Office.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Meetup: April
events.description: Monthly meetup organized by the Open Source Program Office, with details to be announced.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Material Innovation Towards 3D Integrated AI Hardware

events.description: Prof. Sang-Hoon Bae discusses material innovation for 3D integrated AI hardware.

events.title: Dissertation Talk: Quantum One-Time Programs
events.description: A dissertation talk on the topic of quantum one-time programs.

events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (Room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: Prof. Mohammad Hafezi presents on topology and nonlinear optics in nanophotonic devices.

events.title: EECS Colloquium: Can AI assist in Mathematics and Computer Science research?
events.location: Banatao Auditorium (310 Sutardja Dai Hall), UC Berkeley
events.description: A colloquium exploring the role of AI in mathematics and computer science research.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Direct Atomic Layer Processing (DALP®)
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (Room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: Dr. Mira Baraket discusses direct atomic layer processing for next-generation devices.

events.title: EECS Colloquium/CLIMB Seminar: Formal Models of Language Generation
events.description: A seminar on formal models of language generation.

events.title: Introduction to Zotero (In-person)

events.description: A presentation on using machine learning for catalysis research.

events.description: Exploration of the experiences of Brazilian and African Portuguese-Speaking students in higher education.

events.description: A seminar focusing on topics in aerospace.
